title: Data Analyst
description:
The ideal candidate will perform the data management aspect for the enterprise data distribution channel. He/she is expected to possess good business knowledge of the financial industry. Experience with programming will be an added advantage.

Responsibilities:

  • Work closely with business stakeholders, data engineers, and the platform team to implement and support the data distribution solution.
  • Leveraging technology to design an optimal onboarding process with clear visibility of the various life cycles of a product.
  • Contribute, influence, and validate the design of data distribution solutions to ensure they meet both business and operational needs.
  • Perform data access control operations to ensure that data ingested and distributed comply with enterprise data governance and data handling standards.
  • Document the business requirements clearly.
  • Perform user acceptance testing on the data distribution channel and ensure that it meets the requirements.
  • Participate in building new product capabilities and shaping the new features.
    Identify opportunities for continuous improvement in the assigned area of work.

Requirement:

  • Possess a degree in Computer Science/Information Technology or related fields.
  • Possess an ownership mindset to the problem and be outcome-driven.
  • Good problem-solving skills with the ability to provide sound, feasible solutions to problems; be resourceful and conduct fact findings and thorough analysis.
  • Strong advocate of the product, understands how to resolve business problems with the current capabilities.
  • Proactively identify areas of improvement in processes, communication,n and generating insights for better decision-making.
  • Ability to bridge technical terminologies and business use cases.
  • Ability to understand the technology landscape, SDLC, and IT processes and standards to successfully translate problems (both data and technical) into product requirements.
  • Ability to conduct thorough analysis, fact findings, and design processes, and complement with requirements for automation to reduce any manual work.
  • Analyze and understand the trade-offs inherent in differing scenarios of a solution outcome.
  • Ability to clearly communicate analysis in solution proposals and recommendations.
  • Ability to break down the problem to execute step-by-step, leverage AI, and prompt engineering.
  • Proficient in Python, SQL, and Prompt Engineering.

postedCompany.description:
About IoTalents: 
IoTalents.com is an integrated platform for online Hirers and IT Workforce (Employees, Contract workers and Virtual Talents) to get intelligently connected and transact. Our team is immensely passionate about the trend on the Contingent Workforce model and believes that the exploding shared economy of global IT talents will reshape the workforce of the future.

IoTalents kicked off the Tech staffing team in 2016 providing value added staffing and search services for various industry clients both in the start up ecosystem and large organizations in Singapore. We source for tech talents across a wide range of technologies covering both permanent placements and contract placements.
postedCompany.name: IOTALENTS PTE. LTD.
